changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Create Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab notebook template (SRS-aligned - all 8 stages)

column.name: title
column.value: Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab

column.name: objective
column.value: Complete sample-centric workflow for traditional and modern medicine research from initial sample intake through product formulation and archival

column.name: protocol
column.value: TMMRD - Traditional & Modern Medicine Research & Development

column.name: content
column.value: 8-stage comprehensive workflow: (1) Sample Intake & Registration, (2) Authentication, (3) Storage & Herbarium, (4) Sample Preparation, (5) Extraction, (6) Analytical Pathways (dual-path), (7) Product Development & Testing, (8) Formulation & Archival per TMMRD SRS

delete.where: title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND np.page_order = 1

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Intake, Reception & Registration

column.name: instructions
column.value: STAGE 1 (SRS) - Receive plant materials or traditional medicine samples. Record metadata: origin, species, collector, date/time, sample condition. Two-phase workflow: Sample Receipt → Registration & Labeling.

column.name: content
column.value: {"stage":"1","title":"Sample Intake, Reception & Registration","srsRequirements":{"sampleArrival":["Plant materials or traditional medicine samples received","May arrive fresh or dried"],"registrationLabeling":["Assign unique sample ID","Record metadata (origin, species, collector, date/time)"]}}

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND np.page_order = 2

column.name: instructions
column.value: STAGE 2 (SRS) - Botanical verification or expert identification. Methods: Morphological examination, Microscopic analysis, Molecular identification (DNA barcoding: ITS, rbcL, matK genes). Document method used, result (species confirmed, uncertain, misidentified), authenticator name and date. Link to herbarium specimen if prepared.

column.name: content
column.value: {"stage":"2","title":"Authentication","srsRequirements":{"process":["Botanical verification or expert identification","Morphological examination","Microscopic analysis","Molecular identification (DNA barcoding: ITS, rbcL, matK)"],"documentation":["Authentication method used","Result (species confirmed, uncertain, misidentified)","Authenticator name and date","Link to herbarium catalog number if applicable"]}}

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND np.page_order = 3

column.name: title
column.value: Storage & Herbarium Placement

column.name: instructions
column.value: STAGE 3 (SRS) - Assign storage location based on sample condition. Fresh (2-8°C), Dried (room temp), Preserved (fixative/alcohol). Create herbarium specimen if needed: record specimen ID, species, collector, location, date, herbarium cabinet location. Link to LMIS sample record and ongoing projects.

column.name: content
column.value: {"stage":"3","title":"Storage & Herbarium Placement","srsRequirements":{"storageOptions":["Fresh samples: Refrigerated (2-8°C) short-term","Dried samples: Room temperature in sealed containers","Preserved samples: In fixative or alcohol"],"herbariumPlacement":["Mount, label, catalog specimen","Record: Specimen ID, Species, Collector, Location, Date","Herbarium cabinet location (hierarchical)","Link to LMIS sample record","Link to ongoing analytical or formulation projects"]}}

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND np.page_order = 4

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Preparation for Analysis

column.name: instructions
column.value: STAGE 4 (SRS) - Physical processing of samples. Freshly processed or drying (air, oven, freeze). Preparation methods: Grinding, Chopping, Powdering. Document: Method, weight before/after, yield (%), date, operator. Create child/processed samples from original material.

column.name: content
column.value: {"stage":"4","title":"Sample Preparation for Analysis","srsRequirements":{"physicalProcessing":["Freshly processed: used immediately","Air drying, Oven drying (controlled temp), Freeze drying"],"preparationMethods":["Grinding (to powder)","Chopping (coarse pieces)","Powdering (fine powder for extraction)"],"documentation":["Processing method","Weight before/after processing","Yield (% of starting material)","Date, operator"]}}

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND np.page_order = 5

column.name: title
column.value: Extraction, Filtration & Concentration

column.name: instructions
column.value: STAGE 5 (SRS) - Extract compounds from prepared plant material. Solvents: Ethanol, methanol, water, hexane, chloroform. Techniques: Maceration, Soxhlet, Ultrasonic, Distillation. Remove impurities via filtration. Concentrate extract via evaporation or distillation. Document: Solvent, plant weight, technique, temp, duration, yields, operator. Create aliquots/child samples from extracts.

column.name: content
column.value: {"stage":"5","title":"Extraction, Filtration & Concentration","srsRequirements":{"extraction":["Solvents: Ethanol, methanol, water, hexane, chloroform","Techniques: Maceration, Soxhlet, Ultrasonic, Distillation"],"filtration":["Remove plant debris and impurities","Methods: Filter paper, vacuum, centrifugation"],"concentration":["Evaporation (rotary evaporator), Distillation"],"documentation":["Solvent type/volume, Plant weight, Technique, Temp, Duration","Yield (extract weight or volume), Final volume/weight","Yield (% extraction efficiency)","Operator, date"]}}

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true LIMIT 1)

changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND np.page_order = 6

changeSet.comment: STAGE 6: Analytical Pathways (PATH A: Advanced Analysis OR PATH B: Direct to Production)

column.name: title
column.value: Analytical Pathways

column.name: instructions
column.value: STAGE 6 (SRS) - Dual-path decision point. PATH A: Advanced Analysis (Fractionation via chromatography, Identification/Isolation via TLC/HPLC/GC-MS/LC-MS, Purification via recrystallization/HPLC, Characterization via NMR/MS/IR-FTIR, store spectral data). PATH B: Direct to Production (skip analysis, proceed to formulation). User selects path based on research needs.

column.name: content
column.value: {"stage":"6","title":"Analytical Pathways (Dual-Path Decision)","pathA":{"name":"Advanced Analysis Path","fractionation":["Chromatography: column, HPLC prep","Record method and fractions collected"],"identification":["Detect active constituents","Techniques: TLC, HPLC, GC-MS, LC-MS","Link to compound database (if known)"],"purification":["Recrystallization, prep-HPLC, column chromatography","Record purity level (% by HPLC/NMR)"],"characterization":["NMR, Mass Spectrometry, IR/FTIR","Store spectral data (files linked to compound)"]},"pathB":{"name":"Direct to Production Path","description":["Skip advanced analysis","Proceed directly to product development"]}}

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND np.page_order = 7

column.name: title
column.value: Product Development & Testing

column.name: instructions
column.value: STAGE 7 (SRS) - Preliminary phytochemical screening (Alkaloids, Flavonoids, Tannins, Saponins, Terpenoids, Glycosides, Others). Safety/Toxicity studies (in vitro, in vivo, LD50, NOAEL). Efficacy tests (antimicrobial, antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, anticancer). Document outcomes and protocols. Three-way approval: Approve, Further Testing, Reject.

column.name: content
column.value: {"stage":"7","title":"Product Development & Testing","phytochemicalScreening":["Alkaloids, Flavonoids, Tannins, Saponins, Terpenoids, Glycosides, Others","Record: positive/negative for each class"],"safetyToxicity":["In vitro: Cell-based toxicity assays","In vivo: Animal models (if applicable)","Record: LD50, NOAEL, Safety classification","Link to external trial data if conducted elsewhere"],"efficacyTest":["Biological assays: Antimicrobial, Antioxidant, Anti-inflammatory, Anticancer","Document outcomes and protocols"],"approval":["Three-way decision: Approve / Further Testing Required / Reject"]}}

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND np.page_order = 8

column.name: title
column.value: Formulation of Medical Product

column.name: instructions
column.value: STAGE 8 (SRS) - Select formulation type (Capsules, Tinctures, Ointments/creams, Teas, Syrups, Others). Record: Ingredients with quantities/concentrations, Manufacturing steps, Batch number, Manufacturing date. Product QC: Stability testing, Microbial contamination, Heavy metals, Pesticide residues, Active constituent quantification. Document: Product specifications, Batch records, QC results.

column.name: content
column.value: {"stage":"8","title":"Formulation of Medical Product","formulationTypes":["Capsules, Tinctures, Ointments/creams, Teas, Syrups, Others"],"formulationProcess":["Select based on intended use and stability","Record: Ingredients (extract + excipients), Quantities/concentrations","Manufacturing steps, Batch number, Manufacturing date"],"productTesting":["Stability testing (accelerated and real-time)","Microbial contamination testing","Heavy metal testing","Pesticide residue testing (if applicable)","Active constituent quantification"],"documentation":["Product specifications, Batch records, QC results"]}}

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true LIMIT 1)
